caption: A man wearing a green baseball cap, headphones, and a dark green t-shirt sits in a room that appears to be a studio or a clothing store. His shirt features the text "I CI NEVER DO SHIT NETWORK" in white letters. He is positioned in front of a professional black microphone. The background includes several framed photographs on the wall, a white mannequin wearing a white garment, and racks of clothing. Two logos are visible on the screen: a circular logo on the left and a red logo on the right that reads "BODILY TOT". As the sequence progresses, the man's facial expression and posture shift; he begins by looking forward with a neutral expression, then looks slightly downward, and finally looks to the side with a smile while gesturing with his left hand.
